name: Stuffed Clams
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, simmer clams, lemon juice, oregano, and butter for 15 minutes.
2. Add hot pepper sauce to taste, bread crumbs, onion, and green peppers. Mix until the mixture is the consistency of oatmeal.
3. Fill clam shells with the mixture and top with grated Jarlsberg cheese.
4. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees for 15-20 minutes, or until the mixture starts to bubble.
